role: Public sellable buckets and routing limits for the SCBE-AETHERMOORE assistant.

restricted_buckets.name: Government or high-assurance work
restricted_buckets.description: Government, DARPA, proprietary, or high-assurance engagements are not sold through the public assistant and require gated handling.
restricted_buckets.boundary: The public assistant can acknowledge the lane and route to intake, but it should not expose protected workflows or internal details.
